name: send_email_to_owner
description: Send an email to the NEWFTEC team on behalf of the customer. Use when the customer wants to get in touch, request information, or schedule a follow-up. Always confirm with the customer before sending.

customer_email.description: The customer's email address for reply

subject.description: Email subject line summarizing the inquiry

message.description: The message content describing what the customer is interested in or asking about

services_of_interest.description: Which NEWFTEC services the customer expressed interest in

urgency.description: How urgent is this inquiry? Use 'high' only if customer explicitly indicates time sensitivity
